payload.issue_title: Provider Health & Resilience: Cross-Session Health Files & Exponential Backoff
payload.notes: Wave 2. Depends on #1 (now completed). Implements cross-session provider health files at ~/.aloop/health/<provider>.json, exponential backoff, auth-vs-transient classification, round-robin skip of unhealthy providers. dor_validated=false — refinement may be needed before dispatch.
